form.formComment: Two-time winner at black-type level who found Thanks Gorgeous too good last start when first up from a spell, beaten a nose into second in the VRC Sprint Classic (Moomba Plate) over 1100m at Flemington. Look for a big run.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-6). Two-time winner at black-type level who found Thanks Gorgeous too good last start when first up from a spell, beaten a nose into second in the VRC Sprint Classic (Moomba Plate) over 1100m at Flemington. Look for a big run.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Laid in under pressure over the final 200m.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after four months second last of 9 at Flemington in the LR Moomba Plate on March 28 over 1100m, on rain affected going; 7 len behind Thanks Gorgeous carrying 56.5kg at $71. Previously second-up ran on from midfield and won by 1.3 len at this track 3yo Bm64 September 13 over 1100m defeating Intellectual carrying 55.5kg at $2.10. Looks tested.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Near the 300m, shifted out when insufficiently clear of Memo.
Raced keenly in the early stages of the event.

form.formComment: Third-up today. Not raced for 42 days. First-up 3rd of 12 at Caulfield in the G3 Peter Le Grand on February 7 over 1100m, 1.75 len behind Alpha Sofie carrying 58.5kg at $21. Last start 7th of 11 at Flemington 3yo F Hcp on February 28 over 1100m, 5.5 len behind Educated with 59kg at $2.90. Hard to fault if at her best.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Near the 350m, shifted in.
Began awkwardly.

form.formComment: Has won previously first-up and resumes here after a break of 11 weeks. Finished off last campaign second of 9 at Caulfield in the G3 Manfred January 24 over 1200m, 0.5 len behind Space Rider carrying 57kg at $5.50. Previous preparation first-up won by 1.0 len Caulfield Heath 3yo Bm64 December 3 over 1000m defeating Cavalry Girl with 59.5kg at $3.60. Looks forward enough after a recent trial win. Comes back a level this time and gets chance to go one better.

formComments.title: TAB

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Passing the 200m, shifted ground.
Raced wide without cover for the majority of the event.
Passing the 200m, shifted in.

form.formComment: Dual acceptor. Second-up. First-up after four months favourite; was well back until straightening; raced back then made ground from the turn; won by 0.5 len at Caulfield Heath Bm70 March 18 over 1000m defeating Along The River with 58kg at $2.45. Previously second-up favourite; won by 1.0 len at Geelong 3yo C&G Mdn-Sw November 14 over 1207m defeating Tsavo with 58kg at $1.30. Big chance to repeat the dose.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(1). Dual acceptor. Second-up. previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced keenly in the early and middle stages outside the leader.

form.formComment: Puts an unbeaten record on the line. When well in the market on debut, favourite; won by 1.4 len at this track 3yo Bm64 February 21 over 1050m defeating Sir Myka carrying 57kg at $5. Last start favourite; ran on strongly from last on the turn and won by 2.25 len at this track 3yo Bm66 March 9 over 1050m defeating Shocap with 58.5kg at $1.30. Key chance capable of going on with it.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after five months 4th of 10 at this track 3yo Bm72 on March 28 over 1050m, 2.75 len behind Signature Scent with 57kg at $21. Previously second-up came home strongly from last on the turn and won by 0.6 len at Murray Bridge 3yo Bm64 October 11 over 1000m defeating Golden Horizon carrying 57kg at $2.45. Meets a tough line-up and prefer others.

form.formComment: Most recently favourite; came from midfield and won by a long-neck at this track 3yo Bm72 March 28 over 1050m defeating She's My Ex with 57kg at $2.60. The race before that sat on the pace before fading 8th of 15 at Flemington Inglis Sprint on February 28 over 1200m, 3.5 len behind Getta Good Feeling with 56kg at $26. Tough to beat on latest and can measure up again.

Passing the 400m, shifted in slightly.

form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Most recently led but faded 3rd of 9 at Caulfield in the G3 Typhoon Tracy on March 21 over 1200m, 1.4 len behind Point Barrow carrying 56kg at $4.80. The run before that raced right near the speed and boxed on; won by 2.75 len at Morphettville Parks 3yo Bm72 February 14 over 1250m defeating Mostly For Show carrying 53kg at $1.40. Key runner who should be in the finish again.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after four months favourite; tracked the speed and boxed on steadily; won by 5 len at Warrnambool Bm62 March 26 over 1000m on a rain affected track defeating Thunderanlightning with 59kg at $1.80. Previously second-up 3rd of 7 at Ballarat 3yo F Mdn-Sw on October 6 over 1000m, on a slow track; 0.7 len behind Angel Eyes carrying 57kg at $9.50. Can feature with the right run.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Passing the 1000m, shifted in before being straightened by its rider.
Raced wide for the majority of the event.
Near the 500m, shifted out.

form.formComment: Returns from a 43-day let-up. At the latest run won by a neck at Cranbourne 3yo Bm64 February 27 over 1200m defeating Hotspur Reale carrying 57.5kg at $7.50. The run before that won by 2.25 len at Cranbourne Mdn-Sw February 6 over 1200m defeating Melian carrying 57kg at $2.50. Likely to find this out of reach.

Previously first up; fifth of 7 at Bendigo 3yo F Mdn-Sw August 14 over 1100m, soft track; 3.5 len behind Point Barrow with 57kg at $3. Others rate better this time.
